# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: batch-processor-sa
  namespace: batch-processing
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processor
  namespace: batch-processing
  labels:
    app: batch-processor
    component: data-processing
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processor
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processor
        component: data-processing
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: batch-processor-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10000
        runAsGroup: 10000
        fsGroup: 10000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: batch-processor
          image: registry.example.com/batch-processor:1.4.2@sha256:a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 10000
            runAsGroup: 10000
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
              ephemeral-storage: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "2000m"
              memory: "2Gi"
              ephemeral-storage: "1Gi"
          env:
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: batch-processor-secrets
                  key: db-password
            - name: API_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: batch-processor-secrets
                  key: api-key
            - name: PROCESSING_TEMP_DIR
              value: "/tmp/processing"
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: processing-data
              mountPath: /data
              readOnly: true
            - name: output-volume
              mountPath: /output
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - "test -f /tmp/healthy"
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 30
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - "test -f /tmp/ready"
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: "512Mi"
        - name: processing-data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: batch-input-data
            readOnly: true
        - name: output-volume
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: batch-output-data
      restartPolicy: Always
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: batch-processor-netpol
  namespace: batch-processing
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processor
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress: []
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: database
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: database
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5432
    - to:
        - ipBlock:
            cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
